title: ADH Water Balance Explained
script_summary: This script unravels the science behind ADH water balance in a concise and engaging manner.

segments.voiceover: What if your body had a secret to balance water? It does.
ADH, or Antidiuretic Hormone, governs how your kidneys manage water.
When you're dehydrated, ADH tells your body to hold onto water, preventing loss.
Studies show that imbalances can lead to serious health issues, from dehydration to overhydration.
Understanding ADH helps us appreciate how our body strives for balance.
Curious about your body’s secrets? Hit like and follow for more science!

full_voiceover: What if your body had a secret to balance water? It does. ADH, or Antidiuretic Hormone, governs how your kidneys manage water. When you're dehydrated, ADH tells your body to hold onto water, preventing loss. Studies show that imbalances can lead to serious health issues, from dehydration to overhydration. Understanding ADH helps us appreciate how our body strives for balance. Curious about your body’s secrets? Hit like and follow for more science!
